title: 🪞 Soulstate Recursion Membranes
name: Soulstate Recursion Membranes
what_it_is: Dimensional boundaries tuned to soul-state feedback—barriers that reflect only specific recursive identity patterns.
how_to_use: the membrane rejected her—this version of self was out of tune
his soul split until one reflection passed through
animation_behavior: Forms warp against barrier, soul flickers until match found, recursive loop echoes on contact ---
